# projectionMatrix

**Instance Property**

The matrix used to transform position coordinates from eye space to projection space.

## Declaration

```swift
var projectionMatrix: GLKMatrix4 { get set }
```

## Discussion

Convenience functions for creating perspective and orthographic projection matrices can be found in [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/glkmatrix4-pce].
title: projectionMatrix
